Leo (Simha). Leo isthe Sun's house. Ravi (Sun) is the Atma
Karaka planet. It has no other Significance/ karakatwa. Our
belief is or general presumtion is that 7 house means husband's
I wife's house. Sun (ravi) is not any spouse to any one. It looks
rediculous to say that 7 lord Ravi (Sun) gives a spouse for
marriage. It also looks ridiculous to say that 7 container
contains sugar in everybody's house or it would be catastrophe
to believe that 7 tin contains sugar.
The native born in Capricorn (Makara) ascendant, the 7 house
becomes Karkataka (Cancer). Karkaataka (Cancer) is Matru

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 97
Stana or house of Mother. That means it is not possible to give
her own daughter in marriage to the native of this ascendant. this
becomes a debacle. without thinking about these wrong
predicition are made.
rd
A person born in Sagittarius Ascendant (Dhanus), the 3
sign Aquarius (Kumbha) cannot become a mother's house
(Matru stana).
